title: Switch spore-to-seed upgrade to github_id-based lookups
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A seed by any other name
gist.blurb: We've upgraded the Spore-to-Seed auto-leveling system to use GitHub IDs instead of usernames. Go ahead and change your handle—your Pollen credits will still find you!
gist.summary: The Spore-to-Seed auto-upgrade pipeline now uses immutable GitHub IDs instead of usernames, making the system immune to account renames.
gist.impact: Users can now change their GitHub usernames without breaking their automatic Seed tier upgrades, which now evaluate commit activity over a focused 90-day window.
gist.visual_concept: The Spore-to-Seed upgrade represents growth. The GitHub ID change means identity is fixed even if the 'name tag' changes. Polly the bee looking at a Seed with a permanent ID tag, while the Nomnom creature eats old name tags.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot placing a glowing permanent ID tag on a sprouting green seed in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a pile of old discarded name tags nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
